# Vendored OKF test bundles

Markdown-only copies of the three reference Open Knowledge Format bundles from
[GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog)
(`okf/bundles/`), Apache-2.0. Used by `tests/test_okf_corpus.py` (Tier 2) to
validate OKF ingestion against real-world bundles. The generated `viz.html`
artifacts are intentionally not vendored.
